_purpose: Machine-readable project map for Claude instances picking up this project. Read this file first, then HANDOFF.md, then the specific files you need to modify.

entry_points.run.py: Universal CLI runner. Args: experiment_dir [--run N] [--status]. No code changes needed to run experiments.
entry_points.ui.py: Textual TUI. No args. Requires: textual, rich.

core/src/bootstrap.py.purpose: Loads config, builds LLMClient. Called by run.py and ui.py.

core/src/session_runner.py.purpose: Orchestrates one full MACP session. Handles resume logic.
core/src/session_runner.py.break_risk: medium — changing phase order or checkpoint calls affects resumption

core/src/utils/config_loader.py.purpose: Loads and validates all config from an experiment directory. Resolves agent personas from nested/shared files.
core/src/utils/config_loader.py.break_risk: high — changing validate_agents() affects all experiments

core/src/utils/checkpoint.py.purpose: Atomic JSONL event append, session state R/W, config snapshot/conflict detection.
core/src/utils/checkpoint.py.break_risk: critical — changes here can corrupt resumption logic

core/src/api/client.py.purpose: Unified LLM client for Groq and Google AI Studio (OpenAI-compat endpoint).
core/src/api/client.py.break_risk: medium — adding a provider requires mirroring the existing pattern

core/src/api/rate_tracker.py.purpose: Tracks RPD per key per model. Rotates keys on 429. Raises QuotaExhaustedError.

core/src/agents/agent.py.purpose: One agent turn: retrieves reflections, calls actor LLM, parses MACP XML.

core/src/agents/critic.py.purpose: Internal critic pass. Evaluates draft agent messages for evasion of direct challenges. Triggers revision pass if evasion detected. Advisory — failures fall back to original draft.
core/src/agents/critic.py.break_risk: low — failures are silent, original draft returned

core/src/memory/belief_store.py.purpose: Per-agent belief persistence. Tracks propositions with confidence, status (held/suspended/retracted), and revision history. Mirrors MemoryStore patterns.
core/src/memory/belief_store.py.break_risk: medium — index format changes break belief_revision.py reads

core/src/memory/belief_revision.py.purpose: Post-round belief revision LLM pass. Prompts agents to assert/revise/retract/suspend beliefs based on what they said this round. Phase 4b in round_runner.

core/src/protocol/argument_graph.py.purpose: Session-level argument graph. Tracks claims, attack/support relationships, commitment violations, cycling. Updated Phase 1b. Queried by judge Phase 5.
core/src/protocol/argument_graph.py.break_risk: low — judge falls back gracefully if summary is empty

core_modules.purpose: MetaCommunicator bidirectional translation. Group-aware. Called once per sender/receiver pair.

core/src/memory/store.py.purpose: Reflection R/W, index management. One store per agent per session.
core/src/memory/store.py.break_risk: medium — index format changes break retrieval

core/src/memory/retriever.py.purpose: Local embedding-based similarity retrieval (all-MiniLM-L6-v2). No API calls.

core/src/memory/reflector.py.purpose: Post-round reflection generation via actor LLM + persona prompt. Returns structured JSON.

core/src/protocol/hub.py.purpose: Assembles split (meta_comm) or unified broadcasts. Group-aware.
core/src/protocol/hub.py.break_risk: medium — broadcast format changes affect agent input

core/src/protocol/judge.py.purpose: Judge LLM call. Parses CONTINUE/CLOSE XML. Uses running observation log.

core/src/protocol/round_runner.py.purpose: Phase-by-phase round execution with atomic saves. Core of the experiment loop.
core/src/protocol/round_runner.py.break_risk: critical — phase ordering and checkpoint calls must stay consistent

config_files.config/api_keys.json: Provider key pools. Add keys freely — no code changes needed.
config_files.config/rate_limits.json: Per-model quotas. Add models here when using new ones.
config_files.experiments/*/experiment.json: Per-experiment hyperparameters. Safe to edit — validated at startup.
config_files.experiments/*/personas.json: Agent personas. Add domains and agents freely.
config_files.shared/personas/*.json: Shared persona libraries. Reference from experiment agents.

data_outputs.experiments/*/sessions/run_N/rounds/roun: Event log — append-only, do not edit
data_outputs.state/key_usage.json: API quota tracking — do not edit

steps: 1. Add provider base URL to PROVIDER_BASE_URLS in core/src/api/client.py
4. Add reset config to RESET_CONFIG in core/src/api/rate_tracker.py
3. Edit personas.json (agent characters) or reference shared/
